# Work Router

This directory is an output target for implementation backlogs and task plans.
- Files use `YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md`; split-backlog structure rules live in `docs/.references/output-contract.md`.
- Before writing, read `docs/.references/execution-workflow.md`, `docs/.references/output-contract.md`, `docs/.references/prd-change-management.md` when applicable, and the matching `work-*` template in `docs/.templates/`.
- Treat the reference docs as the authority for backlog structure, traceability, and validation.
